task_completion.description: Open the draft soil analysis report
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer (or similar word processor) is open displaying a document with a pie chart, bar chart, map, and text containing placeholders like [REF_FIG_COMP].

task_completion.description: Add automatic captions to the three images
task_completion.visual_evidence: Captions starting with 'Figure' are visible below the images: 'Figure 1: Soil Composition Analysis' for the pie chart, 'Figure 2: Acidity pH Levels' for the bar chart, and 'Figure 3: Sampling Locations Map' for the map.

task_completion.description: Replace text placeholders with dynamic cross-references
task_completion.visual_evidence: The placeholders [REF_FIG_COMP], [REF_FIG_PH], and [REF_FIG_MAP] are no longer in the text. They are replaced by references like 'Figure 1', 'Figure 2', and 'Figure 3', which typically have a gray background indicating they are dynamic fields.
A generated Table of Figures is visible at the end of the document under the 'List of Figures' heading, listing the three figure captions and their page numbers.

task_completion.description: Save the final document as soil_report_final.docx
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor window title displays 'soil_report_final.docx' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file with this name in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor's GUI to edit the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Writer menus, dialogs (like 'Insert Caption', 'Cross-reference', 'Index/Table'), and toolbars, rather than terminal commands modifying the .docx file.

integrity.description: Cross-references and Table of Figures are genuine dynamic fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The inserted cross-references ('Figure 1', etc.) and the Table of Figures have a gray background (field shading) in LibreOffice Writer, indicating they are generated fields and not manually typed text.

integrity.description: Captions were added using the caption tool
integrity.visual_evidence: The captions appear within a frame that encompasses both the image and the caption text, which is the standard behavior when using the 'Insert Caption' tool in LibreOffice Writer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Draft document path: /home/ga/Documents/soil_analysis_draft.docx. Final document path: /home/ga/Documents/soil_report_final.docx.
